mapper.insert: INSERT INTO direct_messages (sender_id, receiver_id, content, read_at, created_at) VALUES (#{senderId}, #{receiverId}, #{content}, #{readAt}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT dm.id, dm.sender_id, sender.nickname AS sender_name, sender.avatar_url AS sender_avatar_url, dm.receiver_id, receiver.nickname AS receiver_name, receiver.avatar_url AS receiver_avatar_url, dm.content, CASE WHEN dm.sender_id = #{userId} THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS mine, CASE WHEN dm.read_at IS NOT NULL THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS `read`, dm.created_at FROM direct_messages dm JOIN users sender ON sender.id = dm.sender_id JOIN users receiver ON receiver.id = dm.receiver_id WHERE (dm.sender_id = #{userId} AND dm.receiver_id = #{otherUserId}) OR (dm.sender_id = #{otherUserId} AND dm.receiver_id = #{userId}) ORDER BY dm.created_at ASC, dm.id ASC

SELECT partner.id AS user_id, partner.nickname, partner.avatar_url, dm.content AS last_message, dm.created_at AS last_message_at, dm.id AS last_message_id, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM direct_messages unread WHERE unread.sender_id = partner.id AND unread.receiver_id = #{userId} AND unread.read_at IS NULL ) AS unread_count FROM direct_messages dm JOIN users partner ON partner.id = CASE WHEN dm.sender_id = #{userId} THEN dm.receiver_id ELSE dm.sender_id END JOIN ( SELECT CASE WHEN sender_id = #{userId} THEN receiver_id ELSE sender_id END AS partner_id, MAX(id) AS latest_id FROM direct_messages WHERE sender_id = #{userId} OR receiver_id = #{userId} GROUP BY CASE WHEN sender_id = #{userId} THEN receiver_id ELSE sender_id END ) latest ON latest.latest_id = dm.id AND latest.partner_id = partner.id ORDER BY dm.created_at DESC, dm.id DESC
SELECT id FROM direct_messages WHERE (sender_id = #{userId} AND receiver_id = #{otherUserId}) OR (sender_id = #{otherUserId} AND receiver_id = #{userId}) ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM direct_messages WHERE receiver_id = #{userId} AND read_at IS NULL
